extraction_mechanism.facebook: Firecrawl /v1/scrape (best-effort, INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL on failure per Contract v2)

search_provider_correction.actual_in_codebase: SERPER_API_KEY (Serper.dev — already wired in env, free-tier, no new account needed)
search_provider_correction.verification: grep -rn SERPAPI in repo returned zero hits; grep -rn SERPER returned active wiring in backend/core/helpers.py and AZURE_ENV_VARS_CHECKLIST.md

sentiment_classification: LLM Trinity quorum (OpenAI gpt-5.2 + Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6 + Google gemini-3-pro-preview). Batched: one call per platform for ALL its reviews. Parses structured JSON [{id, sentiment, themes}]. NO keyword bag. If all 3 providers fail, sentiment=null (not silent neutral).
theme_extraction: Single Trinity call across cross-platform corpus (capped at 60 reviews). Returns top-5 themes with verbatim example_quote and platforms[] list. Parsed into aggregated.themes_top.
aggregation_metric: weighted_avg_rating (Σ(rating·count)/Σ(count)) + sentiment_distribution (positive/negative/neutral_pct rounded) + velocity_total (last_30d/last_90d sums) + cross-platform total_reviews
calibration_integration: Added customer-reviews-deep to asyncio.gather fanout in backend/routes/calibration.py at line ~2454. Both browse-ai-reviews AND customer-reviews-deep run during deprecation window. Output mapped into enrichment.customer_reviews_deep (raw) + enrichment.customer_review_intelligence_v2 (CMO-friendly summary) + synthesised browse_ai_reviews-shaped payload that the legacy _build_customer_review_intelligence consumes as primary source. browse-ai-reviews to be removed after R2B + R2C land + V1-V8 verifies green.
cmo_wiring_note: Surface-level fields exposed on enrichment.customer_review_intelligence_v2: weighted_avg_rating, total_reviews_cross_platform, sentiment_distribution, velocity_total, themes, platforms_found[], review_sources[], has_data, state. The intelligence_modules.py _build_section_evidence_for_cmo touch-up is left for the agent that owns intelligence_modules.py — the data is now ready for it to read (no schema change needed there beyond reading new keys).

provider_traces_breakdown.per_platform_scrape_or_lookup: 5 (one per platform: Serper for google_maps, Firecrawl for the other 4)
provider_traces_breakdown.table: provider_traces (best-effort insert; gracefully no-ops if the table doesn't exist yet — forward-compatible with R2A's enrichment_trace module landing later)

contract_v2_compliance.external_state_enum: Top-level response.state and per-platform .state are restricted to {DATA_AVAILABLE, DATA_UNAVAILABLE, INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL, PROCESSING, DEGRADED}
contract_v2_compliance.no_silent_failure: Failed scrapes return state=DATA_UNAVAILABLE/INSUFFICIENT_SIGNAL with rating=null, count=null, recent_reviews=[]. NEVER ok:true with empty fields and a fabricated rating.
contract_v2_compliance.ai_errors_isolation: Per-platform .ai_errors and response-level ai_errors[] carry internal markers (e.g. scrape_http_404_for_facebook.com). These are INTERNAL — calibration.py's boundary sanitizer (backend/core/response_sanitizer.py) strips them before any frontend response.
contract_v2_compliance.auth_zero_401: verifyAuth via _shared/auth.ts; missing/invalid Authorization returns 401 sanitised body {ok:false, state:DATA_UNAVAILABLE} — no anon bypass, no fallback.
contract_v2_compliance.no_pii: author_handle is first-name-only (helper firstName() truncates to 40 chars and strips digits/punctuation). No email, phone, full name surfaces.

files_changed: supabase/functions/customer-reviews-deep/index.ts (new — 1379 lines incl. comments/blanks; 5 platform extractors + Trinity LLM quorum + per-platform trace + aggregation)
supabase/functions/customer-reviews-deep/test.ts (new — 291 lines; Deno test patches Deno.serve + fetch to assert 401 sanitised, missing-key non-crash, response shape)
backend/routes/calibration.py (modified — +135 / -3 lines; added to asyncio.gather fanout, wired output to enrichment, additive customer_review_intelligence_v2)
backend/tests/test_customer_reviews_deep.py (new — 479 lines; 14 backend tests covering schema, LLM sentiment, themes, weighted avg, Facebook failure path, no supplier names, provider trace counts)

test_results.deno_tests: Authored — execution requires `deno test` runtime which is not present locally (deno not installed). Tests are self-contained with fetch+Deno.serve monkey-patching; will execute in CI / on a Deno-equipped host.

evidence_artifacts.pytest_no_regression_check.txt: no-regression run — 64 passed (calibration edge contract + normalization + response sanitizer)

commits.message: feat(p0-marjo-r2b): customer-reviews-deep edge fn + per-platform Firecrawl/Serper + LLM sentiment/themes — replaces browse-ai-reviews shallow scraper — code 13041978 required to push

follow_ups_for_other_agents: R2A / E2 enrichment_trace: when the provider_traces table lands, the writeTrace() helper in this edge function will start persisting rows automatically (best-effort insert is already wired). No further code change in this edge fn required.

E6 _build_section_evidence_for_cmo: read enrichment.customer_review_intelligence_v2 — fields are ready (weighted_avg_rating, sentiment_distribution, themes, platforms_found, review_sources). The CMO sections customer_sentiment / review_intelligence / review_sources can populate from these without schema changes.

Deprecation of browse-ai-reviews: scheduled for after R2B + R2C land + V1-V8 verifies green. Edge fn entry remains in the asyncio.gather fanout and the synthetic browse_ai_reviews payload generated from customer-reviews-deep ensures the legacy _build_customer_review_intelligence still receives high-quality input during the window.
